underlying_goal: Start the maimai assistant service, verify login, search for candidates with specific keywords ('快手 iOS Android 安卓'), and automatically send greetings to each candidate, skipping failures
friction_detail: The pipeline failed for almost all candidates due to empty profile_urls and inability to handle the '极速联系' (quick contact) page instead of the expected chat page.
brief_summary: User asked Claude to run the maimai assistant pipeline to search and greet candidates, but it failed on nearly all candidates due to missing profile URLs and an unhandled page type; Claude diagnosed the issues and created a fix plan but did not complete the fix.
